LAW AND MOTION 301, MOTION TO ENTER JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO WRITTEN SETTLEMENT (CCP 664.6 & 664.7) MOVING AND OPPOSING PARTIES APPEARED. A R G U E D AND MR. CARDWLL REPRESENTED IN OPEN COURT THAT HE DID NOT FILE ANY OPPOSITION TO THIS MOTION. FURTHERMORE, HE IS VOLUNTARILY AMENDING THE JUDGMENT TO REFLECT ONLY THE INTEREST AND THE ATTORNEY FEES SINCE THE PRINCIPLE HAS ACTUALLY BEEN PAID. JUDGMENT SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. HON. JAMES J. MCBRIDE. REPORTER: ERIC THRONE CSR# 7855
